content: Just as the educational definition of reflexion frames it as a deliberate metacognitive practice that helps language learners refine their writing and understanding by looking back on previous output, the autonomous Reflexion AI agent framework can borrow structured metacognitive scaffolding from high school writing reflection pedagogy to improve LLM self-reflection mechanisms. This structured, step-by-step reflection routine (common in ELA writing workshops) can fix the common flaw of unstructured LLM self-reflection that produces vague, unhelpful critiques of its own outputs.
